## Describe the bug

say what it shows vs. what you expected — correctness bugs are top priority. -->

- [ ] Architecture explorer (point cloud / tensor list)
- [ ] GGUF parser (a specific `.gguf` file)
- [ ] Generation (op trace / panel / playback)
- [ ] Walkthrough
- [ ] Backend / API
- [ ] Other:

2. …

if possible). For backend issues, include the request/prompt.

## Expected behavior

<!-- What you expected to happen. -->

## Screenshots / logs
